shapes.name: TextBox 12
shapes.text: Welcome to today’s presentation on Timmerman Industries’ 2025 Marketing Strategy! We’re excited to share the vision, strategies, and next steps that will shape our marketing efforts in the year ahead.

shapes.name: TextBox 13
shapes.text: Purpose: To align on key strategies, emerging trends, and actionable steps for content development and market engagement.

shapes.name: TextBox 23
shapes.text: The tech market is highly competitive; standing out requires continuous innovation in content and strategy.

shapes.name: TextBox 24
shapes.text: Position Timmerman as an industry thought leader by creating expert-driven content like whitepapers and case studies.

shapes.name: TextBox 25
shapes.text: Rapid technological changes require constant adaptation to new tools, platforms, and content formats.

shapes.name: TextBox 26
shapes.text: Embrace interactive content such as AI-driven chatbots, virtual demos, and augmented reality experiences.
